items.q: From sourcing to handover, the team operated at a level I haven't seen anywhere else in Dubai. Three transactions in, and they remain my first call.
They turned a 14-month off-plan acquisition into a refinanced, leased and cash-flowing asset before completion. Outstanding.
We mandate them on every Palm and Emirates Hills brief. The judgment and discretion are exactly what our clients require.

blog.title: Dubai market intelligence
blog.subtitle: Research notes, deal stories and the trends shaping our market.

items.q: Can foreign nationals buy property in Dubai?
items.a: Yes. Freehold ownership is available to all nationalities in designated freehold areas including Palm Jumeirah, Downtown, Dubai Marina, Emirates Hills, and many more.

items.q: What's the minimum investment for the Golden Visa?
items.a: AED 2 million in property — including off-plan from approved developers — qualifies an investor and their family for a 10-year UAE residency visa.

items.q: Do you handle the entire transaction remotely?
items.a: Absolutely. We complete viewings on cinematic walkthroughs, sign via DLD-approved digital channels, and handle handover, furnishing and leasing on your behalf.
Net rental yields range 5–9% depending on community and strategy. Our advisors will model your specific opportunity with live comparables before you commit.

items.q: Are there any taxes on rental income?
items.a: The UAE does not impose personal income tax or capital gains tax on individuals. A 4% one-off DLD transfer fee and standard service charges apply.

about.hero_title: A decade in Dubai's prime address
about.hero_subtitle: We exist to bring clarity, discretion and lasting value to the world's most sophisticated buyers and investors.
about.story_title: Born in Dubai. Built for the discerning.
about.story_body_1: Luxe Estates was founded in 2015 with a singular conviction — that the world's most ambitious investors deserve advisors who match their standards. From a small team of three working out of a serviced suite in DIFC, we have grown into one of the most trusted private brokerages in the UAE.
about.story_body_2: What hasn't changed is our principle: discretion above noise, judgment above transaction, the long client relationship above any single deal.

integrity.d: We give you the answer, not the answer you want to hear. Always.

excellence.d: From the first viewing to the final handover, we operate at a single standard — the highest.

discretion.d: Many of our finest opportunities never reach the open market. Neither does any detail of our clients' business.

longview.d: We measure success in decades of trust — never in this quarter's commissions.

about.team_subtitle: Multilingual, multi-jurisdiction, and personally invested in every brief.
